body:
## Summary
- routes the bare-answer mutation fixture through the focused generated true/false naturalness validator and asserts the exact q146/q157/q158/q159 generated offender IDs
- adds missing bare-phrase naturalness patterns to validate-content so the fixture fails for the intended category
- keeps q146 generated true/false rows as full political-rights propositions and refreshes the committed CSV/static site exports

## Validation
- `node --test --test-name-pattern '^published question schema rejects generated true/false bare answer phrases$' tests/content-published-question-types.test.js`
- `node --test --test-name-pattern '^q146 political-rights generated true/false exports direct propositions$' tests/content-published-question-types.test.js`
- `node scripts/validate-content.js --focus-generated-true-false-naturalness`
- `npm run validate:content`
- `npm run typecheck -- --pretty false`
- `npm run lint`
- `npm run test:ownership`
- `npm run test:derived-content -- --test-name-pattern 'q146|natural|bare|generated true/false'`
- `node scripts/export-site-question-bank.js --check`
- `npm run content:export -- --check`
- `git diff --check`
title: fix generated bare phrase naturalness guard
